calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ivan Gold, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness Mark Banta was sworn and direct examined.
Default were entered against defendant on May 21, 2010
Doe defendants were dismissed on Oct. 26, 2010

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Lupicai, Inc., a California corporation, dba Lupicia Fresh Tea as follows:

Damages/Principal $300,000.00
Attorney fees $1,950.00
Costs $485.00, for a Total of $302,435.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Dec-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 12/13/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
